subcodes.first_line: O moth of the celestial Candle! As cycle succeedeth cycle and vision yieldeth to vision, through every degree and condition of ascent and exaltation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروانه شمع آسمانی چون کور وجود و دور شهود در جمیع مراتب و شئون عروج و صعود
subcodes.subjects: @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @Manifestation of God as sun
